name: Next.js Starter Kit Dev
start: sh -lc "mkdir -p /var/lib/postgresql/data && chown -R postgres:postgres /var/lib/postgresql && if [ ! -s /var/lib/postgresql/data/PG_VERSION ]; then su postgres -c 'initdb -D /var/lib/postgresql/data --auth=trust --username=postgres'; fi && su postgres -c \"pg_ctl -D /var/lib/postgresql/data -o '-c listen_addresses=127.0.0.1 -c port=5432' -w start\" && (psql -h 127.0.0.1 -U postgres -tc \"SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'nextjs-boilerplate'\" | grep -q 1 || createdb -h 127.0.0.1 -U postgres nextjs-boilerplate) && export DATABASE_URL='postgresql://postgres@127.0.0.1:5432/nextjs-boilerplate' && pnpm --filter @repo/nextjs db:generate && pnpm --filter @repo/nextjs dev"
